legal.termsAndPrivacy: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
legal.kvkkContent:
PRIVACY POLICY

In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), we would like to inform you about the processing of your personal data.

1. DATA CONTROLLER

Your personal data is processed as a data controller in accordance with Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data by the following person:

Data Controller: Resul GINDA
Address: Talas/Kayseri, Turkey
Email: info@kitabe.org

2. PROCESSED PERSONAL DATA

The following personal data is processed when you use our application:

• Identity Information: Name, surname
• Contact Information: Email address
• User Transaction Information: Favorites, suggestions, route information
• Location Information: Your location information if you grant permission
• Technical Information: Device information, IP address, cookie information

3. PURPOSES OF PROCESSING PERSONAL DATA

Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:

• Provision of application services
• User account management
• Provision of favorites and route features
• Evaluation of place suggestions
• Statistical analysis
• Fulfillment of legal obligations

4. TRANSFER OF PERSONAL DATA

Your personal data is processed in accordance with legal obligations and with security measures taken, in line with the purposes stated above. Your data is not transferred to third parties except for legal obligations.

5. RETENTION PERIOD OF PERSONAL DATA

Your personal data is retained for the period required by the processing purpose, in accordance with KVKK and relevant legislation.

6. YOUR RIGHTS UNDER KVKK

In accordance with Article 11 of KVKK, you have the following rights:

• Learn whether your personal data is processed
• Request information if processed
• Learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used for its purpose
• Know the third parties to whom it is transferred domestically or abroad
• Request correction if incomplete or incorrectly processed
• Request deletion or destruction in accordance with the conditions set forth in KVKK
• Request notification of correction, deletion, destruction to third parties to whom personal data is transferred
• Object to the emergence of a result against the person by analyzing the processed data exclusively through automated systems
• Request compensation for damage in case of damage due to unlawful processing of personal data

7. CONTACT

You can contact us to exercise your rights under KVKK using the following contact information:

Email: info@kitabe.org

Last Updated: 2026
legal.consentContent:
CONSENT STATEMENT

In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), your explicit consent is required for the processing of your personal data.

1. SCOPE OF CONSENT

By this consent statement, you accept that you give explicit consent to the processing of the following personal data by the Kitabe application:

• Your identity information (name, surname)
• Your contact information (email address)
• Your user transaction information (favorites, suggestions, route information)
• Your location information (if you grant permission)
• Your technical information (device information, IP address)

2. PROCESSING PURPOSES

Your personal data will be processed for the following purposes:

• Provision and development of application services
• User account management
• Provision of favorites and route features
• Evaluation of place suggestions
• Statistical analysis and reporting
• Fulfillment of legal obligations

3. GIVING CONSENT

By accepting this consent statement, you declare that you give explicit consent to the processing of your personal data specified above for the stated purposes.

4. WITHDRAWAL OF CONSENT

In accordance with Article 5 of KVKK, you have the right to withdraw your explicit consent at any time. You can contact us to withdraw your consent using the following contact information:

Email: info@kitabe.org

5. YOUR RIGHTS

All your rights under KVKK are reserved. You can review the Privacy Policy for detailed information about your rights.

Last Updated: 2026
legal.termsContent:
TERMS OF SERVICE

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS

These Terms of Service set forth the terms and conditions for the use of the Kitabe application. By using the application, you are deemed to have accepted these terms.

This application is developed and published by individual developer Resul GINDA.

2. APPLICATION USE

2.1. The Kitabe application is designed for users to discover cultural heritage places, add to favorites, and create routes.

2.2. You may only use the application for lawful purposes.

2.3. It is prohibited to misuse the application, share harmful content, or violate the rights of others.

3. USER ACCOUNTS

3.1. You must provide accurate and up-to-date information when creating an account.

3.2. You are responsible for the security of your account information.

3.3. If you suspect unauthorized use of your account, please contact us immediately.

4. CONTENT AND SUGGESTIONS

4.1. Places suggested by users are subject to editor and admin approval.

4.2. It is prohibited to share false, misleading, or inappropriate content.

4.3. It is prohibited to infringe copyright.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

5.1. The application content, design, and software are protected by copyright.

5.2. It is prohibited to copy, distribute, or use the application content without permission.

6. SERVICE CHANGES

6.1. We reserve the right to change, suspend, or terminate application services without prior notice.

6.2. Application updates may be made automatically.

7. LIMITATIONS

7.1. The application is provided "as is". No warranty is given.

7.2. We are not responsible for any damage arising from the use of the application.

8. TERMINATION

8.1. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms.

9. CHANGES

9.1. These Terms of Service may be updated from time to time. Updates will be announced within the application.

10. LEGAL DISPUTES

10.1. These terms are subject to the laws of the Republic of Turkey.

10.2. The courts of the Republic of Turkey are authorized in resolving disputes.

11. CONTACT

For questions, suggestions, or complaints, you can contact us:

Email: info@kitabe.org

Last Updated: 2026
legal.disclaimerContent:
DISCLAIMER

1. GENERAL DISCLAIMER

The Kitabe application is provided to users for the purpose of providing information about cultural heritage places. The application content is for general information purposes and is provided "as is".

2. CONTENT ACCURACY

2.1. No guarantee is given regarding the accuracy, currency, or completeness of the application content.

2.2. Place information, descriptions, and photos are subject to editor and admin approval, but errors or omissions may occur.

2.3. We are not responsible for the accuracy of content suggested by users.

3. LOCATION AND DIRECTIONS

3.1. Location information and directions within the application are for general information purposes.

3.2. It is recommended to use current map applications and official sources for actual travel.

3.3. We are not responsible for errors in location information or inaccuracies in directions.

4. VISITS AND SAFETY

4.1. It is recommended to check current information before visiting places listed in the application.

4.2. Visiting hours, entrance fees, and access conditions may change.

4.3. We are not responsible for any damage or accident that may occur during the visit.

4.4. You must comply with safety rules, especially for historical places and archaeological sites.

5. THIRD-PARTY LINKS

5.1. Links to third-party websites or applications may be found within the application.

5.2. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of these links.

6. TECHNICAL ISSUES

6.1. We are not responsible for technical problems, data loss, or service interruptions arising from the use of the application.

6.2. The application may not be continuously accessible and interruptions may occur due to maintenance work.

7. ADVERTISEMENTS

7.1. Third-party advertisements may be displayed within the application.

7.2. We are not responsible for the content of advertisements or the practices of advertisers.

8. LEGAL LIMITATIONS

8.1. To the extent permitted by applicable laws, we are not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the application.

8.2. This disclaimer does not affect your rights that cannot be legally invalidated.

9. USER RESPONSIBILITY

9.1. You use the application at your own risk.

9.2. You are responsible for decisions you make based on the application content.

10. UPDATES

10.1. This disclaimer may be updated from time to time.

10.2. Updates will be announced within the application.

Last Updated: 2026

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: Learn about Kitabe. A platform designed to discover Turkey's cultural heritage.
about.whoWeAreContent: Kitabe is a platform that aims to bring Turkey's rich cultural heritage to the digital world. By bringing together historical places, museums, monuments, and cultural sites from all over our country under one roof, we offer our users a comprehensive discovery experience.
about.missionContent: Our mission is to preserve, promote, and pass on Turkey's cultural values to future generations. We aim to make our cultural heritage more accessible by using the power of technology.
about.visionContent: To become Turkey's most comprehensive cultural heritage platform and enable everyone to discover our country's rich history. In the future, we aim to enrich the user experience not only by providing information about places but also with interactive tours, virtual reality experiences, and educational content.
about.offer1: Detailed information about thousands of cultural sites across Turkey
about.offer3: Save your favorite places and create routes
about.offer4: Community platform where users can suggest new places
about.valuesContent: Preserving cultural heritage, spreading accurate information, and ensuring everyone can access these values is very important to us. We are open to community participation and continuously improve our platform with user suggestions.
about.contactContent: You can contact us for your questions, suggestions, or feedback. You can reach us from our contact page or send an email directly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Kitabe privacy policy. Learn how your personal data is protected.
privacy.dataControllerContent: In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK), your personal data is processed by the following data controller:

privacy.data3: User Transaction Information: Favorites, suggestions, route information

privacy.purpose3: Provision of favorites and route features
privacy.dataTransferContent: Your personal data is processed in accordance with legal obligations and with security measures taken, in line with the purposes stated above. For the provision of services and analytics, we share data with the third-party service providers named below.
privacy.thirdPartyContent: Our application uses the following third-party services, which may process data according to their own policies: (1) Google Firebase: used for authentication, database and storage; (2) Google AdMob: used for advertising; device identifiers and usage data may be processed. You can access these services' privacy policies on their respective websites.
privacy.dataRetentionContent: Your personal data is retained for the period required by the processing purpose, in accordance with KVKK and relevant legislation.
privacy.userRightsContent: In accordance with Article 11 of KVKK, you have the following rights:
privacy.right1: Learn whether your personal data is processed
privacy.right3: Learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used for its purpose
privacy.right4: Know the third parties to whom it is transferred domestically or abroad
privacy.right5: Request correction if incomplete or incorrectly processed
privacy.right6: Request deletion or destruction in accordance with the conditions set forth in KVKK
privacy.accountDeletionContent: To delete your account and personal data: You can permanently delete your account from within the app via the "Delete my account" button on the Account Settings page. Alternatively, you may send an email to info@kitabe.org to request account and data deletion; your request will be processed as soon as possible.
privacy.contactContent: You can contact us to exercise your rights under KVKK or for any privacy-related questions using the following contact information:
